steps.t: The token of peace can be found on King Thorin III's throne. King Thorin has asked you to collect and deliver a token of peace to King Thranduil.
King Thranduil can be found in Felegoth. You have been tasked with delivering King Thorin's token of peace to King Thranduil.
Scouts can be found throughout Felegoth. King Thranduil has asked you to send scouts into Eryn Lasgalen to seek the Weeping Warrior. You should sent t…
